primary_sources.finding: Repository workflow-run listing supports head_sha filtering, requires repository read access, and filtered searches can return at most 1000 results.
Workflow runs are event-triggered; an event-filtered observation cannot establish that no run exists for other trigger types.

repository_observation.claim: No run was observed through the available connector, but absence is not established.

uncertainty: An authenticated, exact-head-sha, all-page repository workflow-run query has not yet been retained.
falsification_route: Provide an exact-commit run returned by a complete query to falsify bounded_no_match, or show that the source observation was complete and unfiltered to falsify indeterminate classification.
claim_limit: This artifact classifies observation quality. It does not prove CI execution, artifact retention, deployment, or device behavior.
